changes.description: BFS-based impact analysis phase — traverses reverse CALLS/IMPORTS/EXTENDS/IMPLEMENTS edges to find blast radius from a file change
Wired impact() to use impact_analysis(), implemented context() method with get_related_nodes()
Added get_related_nodes(node_id, rel_type, direction) for generic edge traversal
Added 4 CLI subcommands: graph-index, graph-query, graph-impact, graph-context with --repo flag
13 tests covering direct callers, transitive BFS, imports/extends edges, depth limits, cycles, sorting
9 tests covering get_related_nodes and ContextGraph.context() neighborhoods
12 tests covering graph-index, graph-query, graph-impact, graph-context CLI subcommands
Updated stale stub tests to match new impact/context implementations
